reviews.review_title: DO NOT DOWNLOAD THIS GAME PLEASE READ
reviews.review_description: The owners are so toxic, they don’t care about the players. I used to be a moderator and I was constantly lied to, bullied, and the owner polarz lies about stuff like crazy. He once said that his brother died to get pity. There isn’t even cool stuff in this game it’s just boring old gorilla tag. Play moose tag or omny tag. Don’t ask for mod because they treat the mods like trash. The owners also sometimes leak people’s ip, which they get due to having playfab access. In conclusion the owner polarz is toxic and his devs skids which means steals from other games.

Purchased some shiny rocks for 14.99 charged my card but never received is there anything I can do to get my money back?

reviews.review_title: Hey please give me the stick in thisgame
reviews.review_description:
Dear Owner 

I trust this letter finds you in good spirits. I am writing to you today to express my earnest desire to be granted the stick in this game. As an enthusiastic player of the game, I have found immense joy and fulfillment in exploring its virtual world and interacting with fellow players.

The stick holds significant symbolic value within the game, representing authority, leadership, and responsibility. I believe that wielding the stick would not only be a personal achievement but also an opportunity for me to contribute positively to the game’s community and overall experience.

Throughout my time playing. I have demonstrated unwavering dedication, integrity, and a strong sense of fairness. I have actively engaged with other players, offering assistance, guidance, and support whenever needed. I am committed to fostering a welcoming and inclusive environment where all players feel valued and respected.

Moreover, I possess the necessary qualities and skills to wield the stick effectively. I am level-headed, diplomatic, and capable of making impartial decisions even in challenging situations. I understand the importance of maintaining order and upholding the rules of the game to ensure a positive experience for all players.

In conclusion, I humbly request that you consider granting me the stick. I am eager to take on the responsibilities that come with this role and to continue contributing to the growth and success of the 
game’s community. Thank you for considering my request, and I look forward to the opportunity to serve in this capacity.

Warm regards,
Seeker5026
Best game ever, im actually demoted staff member.
